name: Sweet-Sour Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Brown pork chops in oil.
3. Place the pork chops in a baking dish.
4. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except onion and green pepper. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Cook for 2 minutes.
6. Pour the thickened sauce over the pork chops.
7. Top with onion and green pepper.
8. Cover and bake for 1½-2 hours until the chops are tender. Serves 4.
Apple cider vinegar can be used.
